description: Nîpisîy is an Indigenous women’s ensemble blending Indigenous tradition and contemporary vocal harmonies with the rhythms of the rattle and the drum in the spirit of happiness, health and healing. Nîpisîy, meaning willow in Cree, perfectly embodies the authentic intention of combining four veteran vocalists to create a powerful and melodic collaboration which intertwines the strength of women’s voices. Together these Northern songbirds, Debbie Houle, Donita Large and Cindy Paul are sure to sing their way into your heart.
title: Nîpisîy Concert
